name: Glow Medspa
description: A sanctuary for advanced skincare where board-certified clinicians pair medical-grade technology with a calm, spa-like touch.

hero.title: Luminous skin starts with expert care.
hero.subtitle: Personalized facial and body treatments designed by dermatology-trained specialists, delivered in a serene, private setting.

services.title: HydraFacial Elite
services.description: A multi-step resurfacing facial that cleanses, extracts, and hydrates with antioxidant-rich serums for an instant, dewy glow.

services.title: Laser Skin Resurfacing
services.description: Fractional laser therapy that softens fine lines, fades sun damage, and rebuilds collagen from within.

services.title: Radiofrequency Contouring
services.description: Non-invasive skin tightening that lifts and contours the face, neck, and jawline with zero downtime.

benefits: Every treatment plan is designed one-on-one with a licensed aesthetic clinician.
Medical-grade technology sourced from the same devices used in leading dermatology practices.
A calm, private studio environment with no rushed appointments or upselling.
Transparent pricing with no hidden consultation fees.
Ongoing skin health tracking so results compound visit after visit.

testimonials.name: Marisa Wallace, Age 34
testimonials.quote: I've tried every facial in the city. Glow Medspa is the first place that actually explained what was happening to my skin instead of just selling me a package.

testimonials.name: Priya Nair, Age 41
testimonials.quote: The laser resurfacing sessions gave me results I didn't think were possible without surgery. The team made me feel completely at ease.

testimonials.name: Sofia Trentino, Age 29
testimonials.quote: It feels less like a spa and more like a private dermatology studio that happens to be beautiful. Worth every penny.

faq.question: Do I need a consultation before booking a treatment?
faq.answer: Yes. Every new client begins with a complimentary skin consultation so we can tailor a plan to your specific goals and skin type.

faq.question: Is there any downtime after treatments?
faq.answer: Most treatments, including HydraFacial and radiofrequency contouring, have zero downtime. Laser resurfacing may involve 2-3 days of mild redness depending on intensity.

faq.question: How many sessions will I need to see results?
faq.answer: Many clients notice a visible glow after a single HydraFacial. For resurfacing and contouring, we typically recommend a series of 3-6 sessions for lasting results.

faq.question: Are your treatments safe for sensitive skin?
faq.answer: Absolutely. Every protocol is customized during your consultation, and our clinicians adjust intensity and products for sensitive or reactive skin.
